g.text: name: Must use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
name: Must use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
Use single-line string for better readability
tools: Tools field is YAML array — runtime accepts this, but CSV string is preferred style
Required trigger phrases: use when, use this, use on, used when, used by, when , trigger, activate,
load this, load when, invoke. Run
lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only
does not match parent directory name
